messages.content: I subscribed to the connected services subscription yesterday and now it's acting up. It's intermittent and flickers on and off. I can see it active on the website but the app shows it as off. Logging out and back in sometimes makes it show up briefly.

reference:
<think>
The cues in the ticket are: intermittent and flickers; active on the website but the app shows off; logging out and back in sometimes. Entitlement was created but the app/CCS cache has not refreshed, so the app shows the feature as missing. so my leading hypothesis is ENTITLEMENT_CACHE_STALE. I also considered TCU_OFFLINE, but a TCU offline issue shows a car-side timeout, not an app showing the feature missing, so I down-weight it. I cannot see the cache invalidation status from the ticket, so I keep confidence around 0.81 and flag what a human should verify.
</think>
